strings.tag: Grissom tells me your investigation has turned up some relevant evidence about Sariel Knox, and now I hear that she's not being very cooperative. Well, I spoke with a judge, and he issued a warrant for a hair sample, a DNA sample and a bite impression from Dr. Knox. That should help your investigation quite a bit. Lt. Jim Brass
I hear you've got all the details of the case. Click the attachment to file your report. -Grissom
